CONTENT.Career: A youth product of Rennes, CPB Bréquigny, and Lorient, Mouazan began his senior career with the reserves of Lorient. He signed his first professional contract with the club on 7 July 2021. He made his professional debut with Lorient in a 4–0 Ligue 1 tie with Strasbourg on 31 October 2021, coming on as a late sub in the 77th minuteOn 28 June 2022, Mouazan signed a three-year deal with Nancy.On 28 July 2023, Mouazan signed a one-year deal with Concarneau, with an option to increase it by one year.
CONTENT.External links: Baptiste Mouazan at SoccerwayBaptiste Mouazan – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in French

SUMMARY: Baptiste Mouazan (born 27 September 2001) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for  Championnat National club Concarneau.
